channel.title: PhantomFeed — codeXploit Cybersecurity
channel.description: Automated cybersecurity news by Aryan Kumar Upadhyay

item.title: CVE-2026-9999 — Critical RCE in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.62
item.description:
# codeXploit Security Post # Title : CVE-2026-9999 — Critical RCE in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.62 # Category : vulnerability # Source : rss # URL : # Generated: 2026-03-03T11:11:22.699698+00:00 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
🔴 [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-9999 — Critical RCE in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.62 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔎 CVE Reference: CVE-202

item.title: Massive Phishing Campaign Targeting Indian Banks — 2026
item.description:
